purpose: Art direction for the first vertical MVP slice.

mascot.costume: blue wizard/adventure outfit with yellow star accent
rules: keep the fox friendly and expressive
use the mascot to support learning, not distract from questions

adventure_map: active node 26 must be visually dominant
bottom navigation has three visible destinations: Quests, Practice, Shop
lesson_question: question card is the visual priority
four answer choices use large tap targets
correct answer 436 uses the green answer style
Hint, Help, and Read controls remain anchored at the bottom
reward_completion: Bridge Repaired banner appears at top
three stars are large and glowing
XP badge is centered and readable
Continue Adventure is the dominant CTA

palette_notes.primary_blues: deep navy text, bright sky blue backgrounds, saturated button blues
palette_notes.star_gold: used for stars, rewards, and achievement accents
palette_notes.magic_purple: used for banners, castle labels, and fantasy accents
palette_notes.fox_orange: used only for the mascot and warm visual accents

typography.style: rounded, bold, highly readable educational-game typography
rules: do not let text touch card edges

avoid: screenshot crops from the original video
crowded lesson cards that reduce readability

future_generation_prompts.screen: Create a polished kid-friendly mobile game screen for MathQuest: Star Trail, bright fantasy floating-island math adventure, cute orange fox guide in blue wizard outfit, glossy rounded UI, readable educational text, star rewards, no watermark.
future_generation_prompts.mascot: Create a cute orange fox mascot for a children's math adventure app, blue wizard/adventure costume with yellow star, expressive and encouraging, polished mobile game art, no text, no watermark.
future_generation_prompts.map: Create a colorful floating-island adventure map for a math learning game, glowing trail nodes, rainbow sky, castle, bridge, flowers, clouds, polished mobile game UI, no watermark.
future_generation_prompts.reward: Create a celebratory reward screen for a children's math game, Bridge Repaired feeling, three glowing stars, +60 XP badge, happy fox mascot, magical night sky, polished mobile UI, no watermark.

component_asset_source.transparency_policy: Reusable item assets should use transparent backgrounds. Full-screen scene backgrounds keep opaque alpha because the artwork itself is the background.
component_asset_source.usage_rule: Prefer assets/items for composable UI, mascot, node, reward, navigation, effect, and world-piece elements. Use assets/screens only as full-screen references.
